backend/main.mo: Main actor for the B³ auction platform implementing auctions, player/team management, user profiles, and role-based access control with admin passcode login and approval workflows.
backend/migration.mo: Trivial migration module that passes state through unchanged, serving as a no-op migration runner.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that the Admin Login page displays user-friendly error messages instead of raw IC/canister rejection errors.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source files to short summaries describing each page/component/hook's purpose and notable implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React SPA titled 'Bid Build and Battle (B³)' that mounts the app at the `#root` div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes (watch, results, admin, team) and a root layout with a Toaster notification component.
frontend/src/components/AppFooter.tsx: Footer component displaying the app logo, a 'Built with caffeine.ai' credit link, and a copyright year.
frontend/src/components/AppHeader.tsx: Sticky navigation header with logo, nav links, and auth buttons that differentiates between admin (passcode) logout and team (Internet Identity) logout.
frontend/src/components/BidHighlight.tsx: Wrapper component that triggers a flash animation on its children whenever a watched `trigger` value changes.
frontend/src/components/ConfirmModal.tsx: Reusable confirmation dialog built on shadcn AlertDialog supporting default, destructive, and success variants with an optional loading state.
frontend/src/components/LoadingScreen.ts: Full-screen loading spinner component displayed as a Suspense fallback while lazy-loaded pages are being fetched.
frontend/src/components/PlayerCard.tsx: Renders a player card UI component with photo, role badge, stats, base price, current bid, and leading team info in small/medium/large sizes.
frontend/src/components/ProtectedRoute.t: Guards routes by checking authentication and either admin or approval status, redirecting unauthenticated or unauthorized users to the appropriate login page.
frontend/src/components/SkeletonLoader.t: Renders configurable skeleton placeholder layouts (card, table-row, text, player-card, list) for loading states using a Skeleton UI component.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor via React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout, identity state, and status flags via an AuthClient-backed React context and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend interactions including players, teams, auction, and user management CRUD operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines global styles, OKLCH-based design tokens, custom utility classes (cyan/pink/navy theming, glows, gradients), and keyframe animations for the app.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility functions for class merging, currency formatting, and mapping backend enums (PlayerRole, PlayerCategory, AuctionStatus, TeamStatus) to display labels and Tailwind color strings.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider, InternetIdentityProvider, and the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page with tabbed UI for managing players (add/delete), teams (approve/reject), auction state, and approvals, using React Query mutations and toast notifications.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLogin.tsx: Admin login page with a passcode form that authenticates via the backend actor, maps errors to friendly messages, and redirects to the admin dashboard on success.
frontend/src/pages/ResultsPage.tsx: Auction results page displaying summary stats, team and player data in tabs, with CSV/JSON export functionality and player photo thumbnails.
frontend/src/pages/TeamDashboard.tsx: Team participant dashboard showing the current auction player, a bid timer, bid history, and budget tracking, with simulated bidding logic and logout support.
frontend/src/pages/TeamLogin.tsx: Team login page using Internet Identity that redirects approved teams to their dashboard or admins to the admin dashboard, and shows a pending approval state with a request-approval button for unapproved users.
frontend/src/pages/TeamRegister.tsx: Team registration page that collects team name, owner name, and email, saves the user profile, registers the team via backend mutation, and shows a success state awaiting admin approval.
frontend/src/pages/WatchPage.tsx: Public read-only auction watch page that displays the current player being auctioned, live bid feed, countdown timer, and auction status (live/paused/completed/not started).
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for extracting URL query parameters from both regular and hash-based routing, with helpers for persisting values to sessionStorage and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom design tokens (navy, cyan, pink colors), box shadows, border radii, keyframe animations, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking the B³ Auction Platform's existing features, known issues (IC0508 canister errors), and pending feature requests including updating the admin passcode to 'sastra2026' and fixing canister startup stability.
